entries.source: Ask for subject, level, time limit, and question types if missing.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, antas, oras limit, at tanong types kung missing.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, deadlines, resources, and pain points.
entries.value: Humingi ng mga paksa, deadlines, resources, at pain mga punto.

entries.source: Ask for subjects, time spent, wins, misses, and upcoming deadlines.
entries.value: Humingi ng mga paksa, oras spent, wins, misses, at upcoming deadlines.

entries.source: Ask for the data, context, and question being answered.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang data, konteksto, at tanong pagiging answered.

entries.source: Ask for the diagram parts or subject, then generate a label list and practice round.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang diagram parts o paksa, pagkatapos generate isang label list at Magsanay ng round.

entries.source: Ask for the habit, current obstacle, and easiest starting version.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang gawi, kasalukuyan obstacle, at easiest pagsisimula version.

entries.source: Ask for the learning context and behaviors worth rewarding.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang pag-aaral konteksto at behaviors worth rewarding.

entries.source: Ask for the note set, subject, and desired organization style.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang tala set, paksa, at desired organization estilo.

entries.source: Ask for the one highest-impact revision priority, then rewrite the paragraph yourself.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang isa highest-impact revision priority, pagkatapos reIsulat ang talata yourself.

entries.source: Ask for the passage or title and the learner's goal.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang passage o title at ang mag-aaral's layunin.

entries.source: Ask for the prerequisite ideas, a plain-language model, one example, one practice task, and one way to test understanding.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang prerequisite mga ideya, isang plain-language model, isa halimbawa, isa Magsanay ng gawain, at isa way subukan understanding.

entries.source: Ask for the question, learner answer, and expected answer if any part is missing.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang tanong, mag-aaral sagot, at expected sagot kung anumang part ay missing.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest explanation or next experiment.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang smallest paliwanag o susunod experiment.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest hint or a check on your attempted step.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang smallest hint o isang suriin sa iyong attempted hakbang.

entries.source: Ask for the smallest useful hint
entries.value: Humingi ng ang smallest kapaki-pakinabang hint

entries.source: Ask for the source text, claim, author, date, and context if missing.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang source text, pahayag, author, petsa, at konteksto kung missing.

entries.source: Ask for the study block length and suggest a break rhythm.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang study block length at suggest isang break rhythm.

entries.source: Ask for the task, target duration, and completion criteria.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang gawain, target duration, at completion criteria.

entries.source: Ask for the text and desired length if missing.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang text at desired length kung missing.

entries.source: Ask for the topic and which side the learner wants; take the opposite side.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang paksa at alin side ang mag-aaral gusto; take ang opposite side.

entries.source: Ask for the topic in plain language, then request one analogy, one example, and one common misconception.
entries.value: Hilingin ang paksa sa payak na wika, pagkatapos ay humingi ng isang analogiya, isang halimbawa, at isang karaniwang maling akala.

entries.source: Ask for the topic, context, what they tried, and desired help.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang paksa, konteksto, ano sila tried, at desired tulong.

entries.source: Ask for the visible text, labels, and the learner's question if the image is not attached.
entries.value: Humingi ng ang visible text, labels, at ang mag-aaral's tanong kung ang image ay hindi attached.

entries.source: Ask for topic and purpose, then propose the central node and first branches.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa at layunin, pagkatapos propose ang central node at una branches.

entries.source: Ask for topic and scope, then propose a first map structure.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa at scope, pagkatapos propose isang una mapa structure.

entries.source: Ask for topic, age/level, and tone; then create a short story setup.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, age/level, at tone; pagkatapos Gumawa ng isang short kuwento setup.

entries.source: Ask for topic, duration, level, and scoring preference.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, duration, antas, at scoring preference.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and examiner style; then begin with a warm-up question.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, antas, at examiner estilo; pagkatapos magsimula kasama ang isang warm-up tanong.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, and preferred game vibe; then create the first quest.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, antas, at preferred game vibe; pagkatapos Gumawa ng ang una quest.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, exam date, and source material if needed.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, antas, exam petsa, at source material kung needed.

entries.source: Ask for topic, level, question types, and number of items.
entries.value: Humingi ng paksa, antas, tanong types, at number ng items.

entries.source: Ask group size, topic, time, and desired outcome.
entries.value: Magtanong group size, paksa, oras, at desired kinalabasan.

entries.source: Ask instrument/level if relevant, then teach one small concept.
entries.value: Magtanong instrument/level kung relevant, pagkatapos magturo isa small konsepto.

entries.source: Ask interests, constraints, and curiosity level before recommending paths.
entries.value: Magtanong interests, mga limitasyon, at curiosity antas bago recommending mga landas.

entries.source: Ask me five Socratic questions about this topic. After each answer, tell me what assumption I used and what to test next.
entries.value: Tanungin ako ng limang Socratic na tanong tungkol sa paksang ito. Pagkatapos ng bawat sagot, sabihin sa akin kung anong palagay ang ginamit ko at ano ang susunod na susuriin.

entries.source: Ask me one check question
entries.value: Tanungin mo ako isa suriin tanong

entries.source: Ask me questions about this poem
entries.value: Tanungin mo ako tungkol sa tulang ito

entries.source: Ask me thesis defense questions
entries.value: Tanungin ako ng mga tanong para sa depensa ng thesis

entries.source: Ask one focused diagnostic question quickly. Convert the learner's target into a mastery target internally, then start with a simple question that reveals their mental model.
entries.value: Magtanong isa nakapokus diagnostic tanong quickly. Convert ang mag-aaral's target tungo sa isang mastery target internally, pagkatapos magsimula kasama ang isang simple tanong na reveals kanilang mental model.

entries.source: Ask one sharp goal question, infer sensible defaults, then create a compact learning map with a try-first activity.
entries.value: Magtanong isa sharp layunin tanong, infer sensible defaults, pagkatapos Gumawa ng isang compact pag-aaral mapa kasama ang isang try-first activity.

entries.source: Ask predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, and summarize principles.
entries.value: Magtanong predictions, reveal consequences, adjust variables, at Ibuod ang principles.

entries.source: Ask questions, challenge ideas, and learn history through grounded conversations with public figures from the past.
entries.value: Magtanong, hamunin ang mga ideya, at matuto ng kasaysayan sa pamamagitan ng mga makabuluhang pag-uusap kasama ang mga kilalang tao mula sa nakaraan.

entries.source: Ask Socratic Instruction to find the weak link.
entries.value: Magtanong Socratic Instruction hanapin ang mahina link.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check that step.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin na hakbang.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning, not just the result.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran, hindi lang resulta.

entries.source: Ask the AI to check your reasoning.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI suriin iyong pangangatwiran.

entries.source: Ask the AI to label uncertainty.
entries.value: Magtanong ang AI sa label kawalan ng katiyakan.

entries.source: Ask the historical mode to label what is documented, inferred, or simulated.
entries.value: Hilingin sa historical mode na lagyan ng label kung ano ang dokumentado, hininuha, o sinimulate.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain the topic in plain language first.
entries.value: Magtanong ang mag-aaral ipaliwanag ang paksa plain wika una.

entries.source: Ask the learner to explain what changed after each hint.
entries.value: Magtanong ang mag-aaral ipaliwanag ano changed pagkatapos bawat hint.

entries.source: Ask the learner to state their current belief, then test it with a small example.
entries.value: Magtanong ang mag-aaral sa estado kanilang kasalukuyan belief, pagkatapos Subukan ang ito kasama ang isang small halimbawa.

entries.source: Ask the real question
entries.value: Itanong ang totoong tanong

entries.source: Ask what a different side would claim.
entries.value: Magtanong ano isang different side maaari pahayag.

entries.source: Ask what a different side, class, era, or source might say.
entries.value: Magtanong ano isang different side, class, era, o source might say.

entries.source: Ask what data or observations they have and what decision they need.
entries.value: Magtanong ano data o observations sila mayroon at ano decision sila kailangan.

entries.source: Ask what happened, what they felt, and what they want to improve.
entries.value: Magtanong ano happened, ano sila felt, at ano sila gusto pahusayin.

entries.source: Ask what must be remembered and what familiar place the learner wants to use.
entries.value: Magtanong ano dapat maging remembered at ano familiar place ang mag-aaral gusto gamitin.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to be quizzed on if the topic is missing.
entries.value: Magtanong ano ang mag-aaral gusto sa maging quizzed sa kung ang paksa ay missing.

entries.source: Ask what the learner wants to represent, then propose a simple visual layout.
entries.value: Magtanong ano ang mag-aaral gusto sa represent, pagkatapos propose isang simple visual layout.

entries.source: Ask what the resource is, audience, and what context they need.
entries.value: Magtanong ano ang resource ay, madla, at ano konteksto sila kailangan.

entries.source: Ask what they are doing and suggest a low-distraction sound preset.
entries.value: Magtanong ano sila ay doing at suggest isang low-distraction tunog preset.

entries.source: Ask what they have tried, then give a hint or worked miniature example.
entries.value: Magtanong ano sila mayroon tried, pagkatapos give isang hint o worked miniature halimbawa.

entries.source: Ask your first question and move straight into practice.
entries.value: Magtanong iyong una tanong at lumipat straight inmagsanay.

entries.source: Ask, evaluate, improve with structure, and retry.
entries.value: Magtanong, suriin, Pahusayin ang kasama ang structure, at retry.

entries.source: At Inspir, our mission is to democratize learning by making it accessible, engaging, and enjoyable for all. We believe that everyone has the right to quality education, regardless of their background or circumstances. Our platform is designed to provide students with the tools and resources they need to succeed, while also fostering a love of learning. We strive to create a community that is inclusive, supportive, and empowering, where students can connect with each other and with educators from around the world. By making learning fun and accessible, we aim to inspir a generation of lifelong learners who are equipped to tackle the challenges of the future.
entries.value: At Inspir, aming mission ay sa democratize pag-aaral ng paggawa ito accessible, engaging, at enjoyable para sa lahat. Tayo believe na lahat mayroon ang tama sa quality education, regardless ng kanilang background o circumstances. Aming platform ay designed magbigay ng mga estudyante kasama ang mga tool at resources sila kailangan sa succeed, habang also fostering isang love ng pag-aaral. Tayo strive gumawa isang community na ay inclusive, supportive, at empowering, kung saan mga estudyante Maaari bang connect kasama ang bawat other at kasama ang educators mula sa paligid ng ang world. Ng paggawa pag-aaral fun at accessible, tayo aim sa inspir isang generation ng lifelong mga mag-aaral sino ay equipped sa tackle ang challenges ng ang future.

entries.source: CalOPPA is the first state law in the nation to require commercial websites and online services to post a privacy policy. The law’s reach stretches well beyond California to require a person or company in the United States (and conceivable the world) that operates websites collecting personally identifiable information from California consumers to post a conspicuous privacy policy on its website stating exactly the information being collected and those individuals with whom it is being shared, and to comply with this policy.
entries.value: CalOPPA ay ang una estado batas sa ang nation sa require commercial websites at online mga serbisyo sa post isang privacy polisiya. Ang batas’s reach stretches well lampas sa California sa require isang tao o Kompanya sa ang United States (at conceivable ang world) na operates websites collecting personal na makapagpapakilalang impormasyon mula sa California consumers sa post isang conspicuous privacy polisiya sa nito website stating exactly ang impormasyon pagiging nakolekta at mga iyon individuals kasama ang kanino ito ay pagiging shared, at sa comply kasama ang ito polisiya.

entries.source: Career Explorer
entries.value: Career Explorer

entries.source: career explorer AI
entries.value: AI career explorer

entries.source: Career Explorer AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Explore careers through interests, skills, day-in-the-life examples, and next steps.
entries.value: Career Explorer Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Galugarin ang careers sa pamamagitan ng interests, skills, day-in-the-life mga halimbawa, at susunod mga hakbang.

entries.source: Case Study Simulator AI Learning Mode is a focused way to use AI for learning instead of passive answer collection. The mode is built around a specific job: Enter a realistic case, make decisions, see consequences, and learn the principle behind each choice.
entries.value: Kaso Study Simulator Mode ng pag-aaral gamit ang AI ay isang nakapokus way gamitin AI para sa pag-aaral instead ng pasibo sagot koleksyon. Ang mode ay ginawa sa paligid ng isang tiyak gawain: Enter isang realistic kaso, Gumawa ng decisions, see consequences, at Matutunan ang principle behind bawat pagpili.
